[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0001011 3
4 0000101 2
5 0000001 1
6 0100001 2
7 0001101 3

23 32 0100001 2 match 6
34 43 0001101 3 match 7

56 65 0000000 a match 0 1 2
67 76 0001010 2
70 07 0001011 3 match 3
